sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75231" key="o)rniqoqhre/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρνῑθο-θηρέω</orth>, <sense id="n75231.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">catch birds,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0510.tlg001:26" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Telecl.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">26</biblScope> </bibl> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀρνιθοθηρᾶν</foreign> codd. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author></bibl>, wrongly; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λαγοθηρέω</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
